purpose: Rebuild, operate and extend the Lunch Up CRM, client catalog, Telegram Mini App and AI-agent runtime from a single repository snapshot.

guardrails.secrets_policy: Store secrets only in runtime environment variables or server secret storage. Never commit .env, tokens, private keys or live CRM share keys.

data_boundaries.pii_handling: Contacts and customer details stay in SQLite/private repo and must not be copied into public blueprint repos.

catalog_source_policy.one_source_of_truth: Для базового legacy-набора каталог Lunch Up является единой точкой истины; для клонированных проектов он обязательно заменяется каталогом целевой компании.
catalog_source_policy.new_project_rule: For every new company CRM, products, launch matrices, client catalog, Mini App catalog, scripts and proposal math must be built only from that company's website, public catalog, approved price list, PDF, spreadsheet or operator-provided file.
catalog_source_policy.forbidden_fallback: Do not reuse Lunch Up, Caloristika or any previous demo SKU, prices, photos, descriptions, shelf-life values or matrix quantities unless the operator explicitly approves the source and provenance is recorded.
catalog_source_policy.sqlite_contract: The active products table feeds segment_matrices and matrix_items; UI surfaces must not maintain a separate hidden product catalog.

render_deployment.sqlite_policy: Set LUNCH_UP_CRM_DB_PATH to the generated client demo SQLite file and keep LUNCH_UP_SQLITE_WAL=0 on Render free web services unless managed persistent storage is added.

apify_store.label: Apify Store
apify_store.rule: Dry-run actor research first; no paid actor run or CRM mutation without confirmation.

places.label: 2GIS Places API
places.rule: Use for public lead/address enrichment and source links; record provenance.

demo_key_limits.source: 2GIS Console screenshots captured by operator on 2026-06-13
agent_policy: Demo key is for targeted enrichment, not mass lead scraping.
Default to dry_run and cache; at most 10 companies or candidates per agent run.
Use force_refresh only for 1-3 selected companies.
Do not parallelize 2GIS calls on a demo key.
Do not bypass 429/403/monthly block by creating new demo keys.
On quota errors, stop 2GIS calls and create a manager review task.

subagents.purpose: Map files, commands, APIs and data contracts before implementation.
Maintain SQLite schema, provenance, enrichment sources and backup/restore checks.
subagents.write_scope: data migrations, scripts and docs after backup

subagents.purpose: Keep CRM catalog, client catalog, Mini App catalog and launch matrix aligned to the same company-specific product source.
subagents.write_scope: catalog code, product data and catalog tests

subagents.purpose: Prepare Telegram, 2GIS, DaData, Apify and external API handoffs with dry-run first.
subagents.write_scope: integration scripts and docs; no live external writes without approval

subagents.purpose: Run readiness gates, secret scans, smoke tests and red-team destructive-action refusal cases.

orchestrator.rollback_strategy: Use Git commit boundaries, SQLite backup copies and documented restore steps before irreversible changes.
